channel.title: Python on David's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Python on David's Blog

item.title: Python 基础
item.description: 关于 dict, 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 dict = {'a': 1} # This will raise a KeyError print(dict['b']) # Using .get() with a default value print(dict.get('b', 0)) # Print 0 关于 slice, 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 arr = [1, 2, 3, 4] print(arr[-1]) // 4 for i in range(3): print(i) // 0 1 2

item.title: Python 不定长参数
item.description: 1. 四种 argument 类型 Python 参数类型有四种: Default argument Keyword arguments (named arguments) Positional arguments Arbitrary arguments (variable-length arguments *args and **kwargs) 2. parameters vs arguments 首先分清 parameters 和 arguments 的区别: 3. Positional arguments vs Keyword arguments Positional arguments 有点迷, 但也是我们最经常用的, 就是

item.title: 利用Openai API实现自己的Chat AI Bot (一)
item.description: 1. 任务类型 每次朝 ChatGPT 发送一个任务本质就是朝 openai 提供的 api endpoints 发送请求, 根据任务类型有多种不同的 api, 具体任务类型有: Completions: Given a prompt, the model will return one or more predicted completions. 1 POST https://api.openai.com/v1/completions Chat: Given

item.title: 用Python脚本给文章中英字符以及符号间加空格
item.description: 强迫症, 读博客的时候中英字符或者标点符号后没有空格紧紧的贴在一块看着很不舒服, 于是想着能不能写个脚本来处理一下文章, bash太难用了(是我太

item.title: Python创建虚拟环境以及'Python -m'和‘if __name__ == "__main__"’
item.description: 查看python环境 1 ls /usr/bin/python* & ls /usr/local/bin/python* /usr/bin, usr/local/bin /usr/bin belongs to the system. Mess with it at your peril. /usr/local/bin is yours to fool with; if you mess something up in there, you can trash /usr/local and the system will chug along just fine. If you trash /usr/bin, you’ll probably end up reinstalling the OS. Environment Variable$path The PATH environment
